steps.title: Spot the physical obstruction
steps.content: The key signal is “every inch” combined with “their wagons, handtrucks, their bursting baskets” — vendors physically fill the street with merchandise.

steps.title: Apply the signal to choices
steps.content: ”Providing resistance to” fits: the vendors' physical presence blocks the taxi's passage. Arguing about (A), disapproving of (B), and asserting possession of (C) describe effects the text doesn't show — only physical obstruction. That matches choice D — D is correct.
